title: HyperSage Trace — Evaluation Report
subtitle: Versioned LLM-judge evaluation across trace test runs

runs.label: Pre-fix baseline
runs.note: Degraded-state baseline: synthesis timing out, raw tool dumps, narration leak. Scored 1–5 by an LLM judge against the dev team's Slack-thread resolution.

runs.label: Post-fix (deploy #1113)
runs.note: After the trace fixes (single-agent synthesis bypass, narration leak, synthesis-timeout + DB-pool stability). Same query set, re-scored against the dev team's Slack-thread resolution.
